---
title: "Methods"
---

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| [<span class="blue-badge">Methods & Interpretation ↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-DlaIOIvnQBYJNo8rJH51RvTGDmv6JFJAnk2MSbpzUQ/edit?slide=id.p#slide=id.p)  | SGN Ch. 2: *The Toolbox*  | McCabe & Castel 2008 |


::: {.callout-tip}
## Learning Goals



:::

<!-- Mentimeter
intro: temp check

1. Which view is this? 
(Sagittal, axial, coronal)

1. Label the lobes
label, one at a time:
* lobes
* anterior, posterior, inferior, superior, medial, ventral



how much did you understand of today's class?
muddiest point?
-->
